description: Known deprecation drift debt as of 2026-05-12. New violations outside this baseline must be fixed before merge.

findings.message: datetime.utcnow() is deprecated in Python 3.12; use datetime.now(UTC)
findings.reason: Shared production code; changing to timezone-aware datetime may affect naive-datetime comparisons across layers. Remediation requires cross-layer testing.
findings.removal_condition: Migrate all datetime.utcnow() in shared code to datetime.now(UTC) and verify no naive-datetime comparison regressions.

findings.message: Request | None is not a valid Pydantic response field type
findings.reason: Layer 4 production code; outside current hardening scope. Using Request as a response field type is a FastAPI anti-pattern.
findings.removal_condition: Layer 4 owner refactors endpoint to not use Request as a Pydantic response model field.
